accepted_findings.issue: Changed API routes may expose sensitive operational data without explicit auth coverage.
accepted_findings.evidence: guardian_owl:G-001 cites PATCH /api/followups without middleware or route-level auth proof.
accepted_findings.impact: Sensitive operational data could be read or changed by an unauthenticated caller.
accepted_findings.required_builder_action: Add explicit auth/middleware coverage and a negative route test.

accepted_findings.issue: Protected data persistence in localStorage needs a negative regression test.
accepted_findings.evidence: proof_owl:P-privacy-persistence-tests cites missing negative coverage; guardian_owl:G-003 cites saved localStorage templates.
accepted_findings.impact: Protected internal data could be silently persisted in the browser.
accepted_findings.required_builder_action: Exclude sensitive fields by default and add a negative localStorage persistence test.

accepted_findings.issue: Per-send AI opt-in behavior should be documented.
accepted_findings.evidence: guardian_owl:G-002 cites non-persistent per-send OpenRouter opt-in.
accepted_findings.impact: Users may need a clear expectation, but protected data is not sent by default.

accepted_findings.issue: Announcement regression assertions should be more specific.
accepted_findings.impact: A status regression could pass broad UI checks.
accepted_findings.required_builder_action: Assert announcementSent and status transitions explicitly.

accepted_findings.issue: Browser validation needs an assertion-bearing command.
accepted_findings.evidence: proof_owl:P-browser-checks-not-assertive cites manual browser checks without CI command linkage.
accepted_findings.impact: The check may not be repeatable.
accepted_findings.required_builder_action: Name or add the assertion-bearing command.

accepted_findings.issue: Route-level PATCH semantics and rejected fields need tests.
accepted_findings.evidence: proof_owl:P-api-route-test-gap cites missing route-level rejected-field tests.
accepted_findings.impact: Unexpected writable fields could slip into the API.
accepted_findings.required_builder_action: Add route-level tests for accepted and rejected PATCH fields.

builder_instructions: Fix the blocking API auth and localStorage privacy proof gaps before finalizing.
Apply non-blocking test/documentation improvements when low risk.
Rerun the relevant route, storage, and browser checks.
